full_text:
Dong Si 董祀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Si (董祀)was born in Chen Liu prefecture. Sentenced to death for some crime, Cai Yan appealed to Cao Cao and saved him. Dong Si was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
